metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_3723
metadata.comment:
Rationale: FIGURE 6: Stx4 knock down blocks TfR-SEP membrane insertion following stimulation with Bic/Gly suggesting Syntaxin-4 mediates activity-triggered exocytosis in dendrites/spines
FIGURE 7: Stx4 deltaTM prevents LTP in Schaffer collaterals. LTP was induced by depolarizing the cell to 0 mV and delivering 200 stimuli at 2 Hz. Using standard intracellular solution, this induction protocol reliably triggered robust sustained potentiation of EPSC amplitudes to 172 ± 18% of baseline (Figure 7A). However, LTP was almost completely abolished (EPSC amplitudes 111 ± 19% of baseline) when purified Stx4DTM (2.5 mM) was included in the recording solution.

19/6/2018 Pim
- Fig.3: "AMPA Receptors are Directly Inserted Into the Spine Plasma Membrane"
- Fig.5: "Stx4 Marks Sites of Exocytosis at the Spine Membrane". Experimental description: M&M: Hippocampal neuron cultures were prepared from E18 RAT embryos
LTP experiments were performed using transverse hippocampal slices cut from C57Bl/6 MICE (350 mm,
